vibe: Premium, modern, distinctive, high-trust, and confidence-inspiring

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight font-medium text-foreground leading-none
hierarchy.label: text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70

typography.rules: Never center headings by default. Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'Figtree' for body text. Do not use 'Inter' or 'Roboto'. Line-height must be tight for headings.

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 for bento grid cards. Grid gaps should be gap-6 or gap-8.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-lg for buttons and inputs. Do not go overly soft.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-sm for flat surfaces, shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(13,35,30,0.06)] for elevated cards. Use 1px subtle borders (border-border/40) for structure.
spacing_and_layout.optical_alignment: Align elements visually, prioritizing negative space and breathing room.

animation.hover: Subtle background shifts or border color changes. e.g., hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out.
animation.entrance: Staggered fade-in-up for lists and grid items. Use framer-motion.
animation.interactive: Active states must have clear visual feedback without jarring layout shifts.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react. NO emojis. Provide distinct, elegant outline icons.

media.instructions: Always use provided media URLs. Do not use placeholder services.

/login.layout: Split screen layout (grid md:grid-cols-2). Left pane: Content centered vertically, brand logo top left, headline 'Every brand deal lives in a thread. ThreadComb reads them all.', and Google Sign-in button. Right pane: the 'onboarding_abstract_bg' image with a subtle dark overlay if needed, covering the full height.
components: Shadcn Button for Google Sign-in (use lucide-react Google-like icon or generic mail icon)

/onboarding/step-1-platform.layout: Centered wizard container. Top: Progress indicator (Step 1 of 4). Title: 'Where do your threads live?'. Content: 3 large Bento-style Cards (Instagram, YouTube, Both).
/onboarding/step-1-platform.interactions: Cards should have a subtle border (border-border) that turns to solid primary color on selection or hover. Use lucide icons for platforms.

/onboarding/step-2-niche.layout: Centered wizard container. Progress (Step 2 of 4). Title: 'What is your creative DNA?'. Content: Grid (grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4) of 12 selectable niche pills/cards.
/onboarding/step-2-niche.interactions: First selected is Primary (highlighted distinctively, e.g., solid bg), next 1-2 are Secondary (outlined with primary color).

/onboarding/step-3-profile.layout: Centered wizard container. Progress (Step 3 of 4). Title: 'Weave your profile'. Form layout in a clean card (p-8).
/onboarding/step-3-profile.fields: Input for Handle. Select dropdowns for Follower count, Geography, and Language. Use Shadcn Form, Input, and Select components.

/onboarding/step-4-connect.layout: Centered wizard container (wider max-w-3xl). Progress (Step 4 of 4). Title: 'Authorize your ThreadComb'. Subtitle focusing on Trust.
/onboarding/step-4-connect.content: Bento Grid layout for 3 sections. Section A: 'What ThreadComb will read' (background accent-green-bg, text accent-green-text, subtle check icons). Section B: 'What ThreadComb will NEVER read' (background accent-red-bg, text accent-red-text, cross/shield icons). Section C: 'Your data is protected' (minimalist checklist). Bottom: Large 'Connect Gmail' primary button.

/dashboard.layout: Full screen layout. Left: Sidebar Navigation (fixed, minimal). Top: Header (Logo left, Creator Avatar right). Center: Main content area.
/dashboard.content: Empty State only. Centered card (max-w-xl p-12 text-center) displaying the message: 'We're getting ready to read your threads...'. Disabled primary CTA button 'Start Your Audit'.

component_instructions.shadcn_ui: Install and use shadcn/ui components for Buttons, Forms, Inputs, Selects, and Cards. Heavily customize their styles (especially border-radius, shadows, and padding) to match the Organic & Earthy archetype. Do NOT use default Vercel/Stripe styles. Customize standard Card to remove default heavy borders unless intentional.
component_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react. Replace any default emojis with elegant SVGs.
